zh.lifeSummary: 當Heinrich III Graf von Salm於大約1170年出生在法國阿爾薩斯巴-爾薩爾姆時，他的父親Heinrich II Graf von Salm26歲，母親Jutta22歲。他和Judith de Haute-Lorraine至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1246年在法國布格可雷希享年77歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Heinrich III Graf von Salm于大约1170年出生在法国阿爾薩斯巴-爾薩爾姆时，他的父亲Heinrich II Graf von Salm26岁，母亲Jutta22岁。他和Judith de Haute-Lorraine至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1246年在法国布格可雷希享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: Heinrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Heinrich III Graf von Salm was born about 1170, in Salm, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France, his father, Heinrich II Graf von Salm, was 26 and his mother, Jutta, was 22. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Judith de Haute-Lorraine. He died in 1246, in Crécy, Yonne, Burgundy, France, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Heinrich III Graf von Salm est né environ 1170, à Salm, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France, son père, Heinrich II Graf von Salm, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Jutta, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Judith de Haute-Lorraine. Il est décédé en 1246, à Crécy, Yonne, Bourgogne, France, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Heinrich III Graf von Salm um 1170 in Salm, Niederrhein, Elsaß, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Heinrich II Graf von Salm 26 und seine Mutter Jutta 22. Er hatte mit Judith de Haute-Lorraine mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1246 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Crécy, Yonne, Burgund, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich III Graf von Salm è nato il circa 1170 nel Salm, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, Francia, il suo padre, Heinrich II Graf von Salm, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Jutta, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Judith de Haute-Lorraine. Morì nel 1246, nel Crécy, Yonne, Bourgogne, Francia, all'età di 77 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Heinrich III Graf von Salmが約1170年にフランスアルサスバス-ルヒンサルムで生まれた時，父Heinrich II Graf von Salmは26歳，母Juttaは22歳であった。彼はJudith de Haute-Lorraineとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1246年にフランスボウルゴグンイオンクルeシで77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Heinrich III Graf von Salm(이)가 대략 1170년 프랑스 알사스 바스-히 살름에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Heinrich II Graf von Salm(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Jutta(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Judith de Haute-Lorraine(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1246년 프랑스 부르고그니 욘 크e시에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich III Graf von Salm nasceu aproximadamente 1170, em Salm, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, França, seu pai, Heinrich II Graf von Salm, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Jutta, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Judith de Haute-Lorraine. Ele faleceu em 1246, em Crécy, Yonne, Bourgogne, França, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Heinrich III Graf von Salm родился около 1170 г. в местности салм, бас-рин, алсеис, Франция, его отцу по имени Heinrich II Graf von Salm было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Jutta, 22. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Judith de Haute-Lorraine. Он умер в 1246 г. в местности крeси, енн, бургогн, Франция в возрасте 77 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Heinrich III Graf von Salm nació aproximadamente 1170, en Salm, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, Francia, su papá, Heinrich II Graf von Salm, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Jutta, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Judith de Haute-Lorraine. Murió en 1246, en Crécy, Yonne, Bourgogne, Francia, a la edad de 77 años.
